label: Tech / SaaS / Internet (Revenue-growth + Rule-of-40 focus)
applies_to_industries_example: Internet Retail (subset where business model is platform-revenue)

deferred_concepts.reason: Annual recurring revenue — SaaS supplemental disclosure

notes: Tech/SaaS valuation is driven by revenue growth on margin trajectory — Rule of 40 (revenue_growth + operating_margin ≥ 40%) is the canonical screen. trailingPE absent because SaaS issuers are commonly loss-making in growth phase; forwardPE pass-through retained because consensus EPS is the analyst convention even when current GAAP earnings are negative. evEbitda absent because SBC-heavy cost base often makes EBITDA look better than economic reality — investors prefer FCF-margin instead. priceToBook absent because asset-light SaaS books are dominated by goodwill from M&A and don't reflect economic value.
